name: yellow room
items_start: Yellow door with tv camera over it
hints: Another security door with a camera. This one requires higher clearance than visitor level.
You need maintenance or security level ID to pass this yellow door. Visitor ID is insufficient.
SHOW PICTURE with maintenance or security badge to pass through to the yellow corridor.
SHOW PICTURE with maintenance or security badge. Visitor badge is rejected. Leads to the yellow corridor (room 14).

effects: Message: The door opens just long enough for me to scurry through.
Message: The door opens just long enough for me to scurry through.

notes: Yellow security door requiring maintenance or security clearance. Visitor badge is insufficient. Leads to the yellow corridor (room 14) and maintenance area beyond.
